div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Chile (Collier)The same, mutatis mutandis, to the Ambassador in Peru, as Department’s telegram No. 21 (file No. 723.2515PC/9a).
div.p: 12. Inform Chilean authorities that the President has today appointed General John J. Pershing as President of the Plebiscitary Commission. The Department hopes to be able to advise you in a few days of the President’s nominee on the Special Commission to determine the boundaries of Tacna-Arica.By telegrams of Mar. 27, 5 p.m., the Ambassadors in Chile and Peru were instructed to inform the Governments to which they were accredited that Gen. Jay J. Morrow, U. S. Army (retired), ex-Governor of the Panama Canal Zone, had been appointed American member of the Special Boundary Commission (file No. 723.2515PC/15a,b).
